category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and split-type air conditioners, residential and light commercial, exported from China to Nigeria

title.en: China-to-Nigeria Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入尼日利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入尼日利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Nigeria's SON MANCAP mandatory certification framework, NIS/IEC safety standards, NERC/ECN energy efficiency label programme under NEEAP, NAFDAC refrigerant controls, and FCCPC consumer protection obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与尼日利亚SON MANCAP强制认证框架、NIS/IEC安全标准、NERC/ECN在NEEAP下的能效标签计划、NAFDAC制冷剂管控及FCCPC消费者保护义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與尼日利亞SON MANCAP強制認證框架、NIS/IEC安全標準、NERC/ECN在NEEAP下的能效標籤計劃、NAFDAC製冷劑管控及FCCPC消費者保護義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body decision, SON MANCAP determination, NAFDAC approval, NERC or ECN energy label ruling, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current SON mandatory product certification scope, NIS standard editions, NEEAP energy label requirements, NAFDAC refrigerant approvals, and FCCPC obligations with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation in Nigeria.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、符合性评定机构决定、SON MANCAP裁定、NAFDAC批准、NERC或ECN能效标签裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在向尼日利亚出货、销售或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行SON强制产品认证范围、NIS标准版本、NEEAP能效标签要求、NAFDAC制冷剂批准及FCCPC义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、符合性評定機構決定、SON MANCAP裁定、NAFDAC批准、NERC或ECN能效標籤裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在向尼日利亞出貨、銷售或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行SON強制產品認證範圍、NIS標準版本、NEEAP能效標籤要求、NAFDAC製冷劑批准及FCCPC義務。

answer_first.en: SON MANCAP mandatory product certification (including pre-shipment inspection) to NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 safety standards, energy efficiency labelling under the NEEAP/NERC/ECN programme, R-22 phasedown compliance under Nigeria's HCFC programme, and voltage adaptation for 240 V 50 Hz supply are the major Nigeria compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pump exporters. China's CCC certification is not recognised by SON.
answer_first.zh: SON MANCAP强制产品认证（含装运前检验）符合NIS/IEC 60335-2-40安全标准、NEEAP/NERC/ECN能效标签计划、尼日利亚HCFC计划下的R-22淘汰合规，以及适配240 V 50 Hz电源，是中国空气源热泵出口商进入尼日利亚的主要合规差距。中国CCC认证不被SON认可。
answer_first.zht: SON MANCAP強制產品認證（含裝運前檢驗）符合NIS/IEC 60335-2-40安全標準、NEEAP/NERC/ECN能效標籤計劃、尼日利亞HCFC計劃下的R-22淘汰合規，以及適配240 V 50 Hz電源，是中國空氣源熱泵出口商進入尼日利亞的主要合規差距。中國CCC認證不被SON認可。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or upon material regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
